segments:
: ذَكَرْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْبَيْتَ فَقَالَ «لَوْ عَطَّلُوهُ سَنَةً وَاحِدَةً لَمْ يُنَاظَرُوا ».
وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «لَيَنْزِلُ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلْعَذَابُ ».
arabic.text:
: ذَكَرْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْبَيْتَ فَقَالَ «لَوْ عَطَّلُوهُ سَنَةً وَاحِدَةً لَمْ يُنَاظَرُوا ».
وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «لَيَنْزِلُ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلْعَذَابُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2860 - Hanan ibn Sadir narrated: I mentioned the House (the Ka'bah) to Abu Ja'far (as),
Imam (as) said: "If they were to abandon it for a single year, they would not be given respite."
In another narration, Imam (as) said: "Punishment would descend upon them."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2860 - Hanan ibn Sadir narrated: I mentioned the House (the Ka'bah) to Abu Ja'far (as),
Imam (as) said: "If they were to abandon it for a single year, they would not be given respite."
In another narration, Imam (as) said: "Punishment would descend upon them."
